rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the ECE numbers and the variant count).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (no downstream-harm avoidance).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
